selected_title: Dynamic Capabilities, Talent Development and Firm Performance
question: What operational artifact in “Dynamic Capabilities, Talent Development and Firm Performance” could make the Dynamic capabilities feedback loop auditable?

evidence_spans.text: All firms aim at high performance which leads to hi gh profits and sustainable competitive advantage. However all firms face a challenge on how to create sustainable competitive advantage especially on the rapid changing environment. This conceptual study paper hence looks at the dyna mic capabilities which have been identified to assist firms in creating and sus taining competitiveness in the ever changing environment. Specifically the paper looks at the nature of the sensing, seizing, transforming and managerial dynamic capabilities and how their interconnection influence firm performance. The study is anchored on the dynamic capability theory. The main objectives of the study are to understand how interconnectivity of various clusters of dynamic ca pabilities influences firm performance.
